subject: Can't log in
body: Hi team — I've been trying to log in since this morning and I keep getting 'invalid credentials'. I've reset my password twice. This is blocking my team. Any ideas? — Marcus

subject: Billing question
body: Could you explain the $49 line item on my March invoice labelled 'platform uplift'? We weren't expecting that charge.

subject: Feature request: bulk export
body: Would love to be able to export the activity log for the whole quarter in a single CSV. Right now I have to click through month-by-month.

subject: EVERYTHING IS DOWN
body: our entire checkout flow is returning 500s from your API since 09:12 UTC. we are losing revenue. please escalate.

subject: Thanks!
body: Just wanted to say the new dashboard is really well done. My team noticed the p95 latency widget immediately.

subject: Question about SSO
body: We're migrating to Okta next month. Does your SAML integration support group-based role mapping, or only user-level assignment?

subject: Double charge
body: I was charged twice for last month's subscription. Invoice INV-88123 and INV-88127. Please refund one of them. Also — how did this happen?

subject: API rate limit on /v1/export
body: We're hitting 429s on /v1/export even though our usage dashboard says we're at 40% of our monthly quota. Are there per-endpoint caps I'm missing?

subject: Account locked
body: I was travelling, tried to sign in from a new laptop, now my account is locked and the 'unlock' email never arrives. I've checked spam. Can someone unlock manually?

subject: Data export still failing
body: This is the third ticket on this. Every time I kick off a full org export it gets to ~60% and silently dies — no email, no error on the UI. I have a compliance deadline Friday.

subject: Feature: dark mode
body: hey, dark mode when? my eyes.

subject: Invoice address wrong
body: Could you update the billing address on our account from the old London office (42 Heddon St) to our new one (8 Marshalsea Rd)? Tax ID unchanged.

subject: Suspicious login attempt
body: I got an alert email about a sign-in attempt from an IP in a country I've never been to. I've already rotated my password and enabled 2FA. Can someone confirm whether the attempt actually succeeded, and check the audit log for any data access?

subject: Price quote for 50 seats
body: We're scoping a rollout to an additional 50 users on top of our current 20. Can you send over enterprise pricing and whether volume discounts apply above 100 seats?

subject: Webhook retries
body: I notice your webhooks retry 3 times with no jitter. On our side a 3-attempt burst overlaps with our primary DB failover window once a week and we lose the event. Could you add configurable retry spacing, or at least surface the dead-letter queue to customers?
